description: SGT timestamp for the hourly row.
validation_check: column present; non-null in prospective rows; parseable as timestamp in downstream review
column present; non-null in prospective rows; matches timestamp_sgt hour

description: Official station identifier for prospective evaluation grouping.
validation_check: column present; non-null; grouped station diagnostics can be refreshed

description: Observed official WBGT in Celsius used as the prospective evaluation target.
forbidden_interpretation: training target for new models in this lane
validation_check: column present; numeric; defines ge31/ge33 observed events

description: Frozen System A deterministic WBGT_A primary output.
forbidden_interpretation: local 100 m WBGT or official warning
validation_check: column present; numeric; fixed_31 baseline can be evaluated
column present; non-null frozen model metadata
column present; non-null frozen version metadata

description: Row provenance label that separates retrospective and prospective rows.
validation_check: column present; at least one prospective row for evaluation

description: Compact quality/provenance flag for formal snapshot rows.
validation_check: column present; non-null compact provenance flag

description: Optional diagnostic probability for official WBGT >=31 C.
validation_check: if present, numeric within [0, 1]; metadata columns should be populated
if p_ge31_optional present, non-null model id expected

description: Optional policy id for interpreting p_ge31_optional.
validation_check: if p_ge31_optional present, non-null policy id expected

description: Exploratory optional probability for official WBGT >=33 C.
validation_check: if present, numeric within [0, 1]; remains exploratory

description: Optional expected exceedance magnitude above 31 C.
validation_check: if present, numeric expected exceedance against max(official_wbgt_c - 31, 0)

description: Optional lower diagnostic interval bound for wbgt_a_c.
validation_check: if present with high bound, numeric and <= high bound

description: Optional upper diagnostic interval bound for wbgt_a_c.
validation_check: if present with low bound, numeric and >= low bound

description: Optional lead time when the prospective row has forecast lead-time context.
forbidden_interpretation: claim of forecast skill without validation
validation_check: if forecast lead time exists, numeric lead time for stratified review
